task_context.actionable_question: What concrete actions should the admin take in the next 2 weeks?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Synthesise all cohort [FE] signals into 3–5 admin actions. This is the most critical AI synthesis task for admin role.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: The prioritized actions focus on addressing engagement and assessment support based on identified patterns in student performance data. These actions aim to enhance student support and improve overall learning outcomes.

Insights: High Engagement Outreach Needed: A targeted engagement outreach is necessary due to a derived low engagement rate of 1.0, indicating all students are classified as low engagement. This action is prioritized as high and is owned by the student support team with a deadline of 7 days. | Assessment Support Review Required: A review of learner support and preparation materials for the hardest assessment (G1) is needed, as this action is prioritized medium and owned by the module lead with a deadline of 14 days.

explanation.summary: The prioritized actions focus on addressing engagement and assessment support based on identified patterns in student performance data. These actions aim to enhance student support and improve overall learning outcomes.

insights.title: High Engagement Outreach Needed
insights.description: A targeted engagement outreach is necessary due to a derived low engagement rate of 1.0, indicating all students are classified as low engagement. This action is prioritized as high and is owned by the student support team with a deadline of 7 days.

evidence.context: Derived from low engagement count and total students.

insights.title: Assessment Support Review Required
insights.description: A review of learner support and preparation materials for the hardest assessment (G1) is needed, as this action is prioritized medium and owned by the module lead with a deadline of 14 days.

evidence.context: Identified as the hardest assessment requiring review.

confidence.reason: The evidence used to support the actions is complete and derived from reliable data sources.

v3_warnings: Task-aware V3 prompt exceeded the configured soft token ratio (16.1695 > 1.2).
Task-aware V3 prompt remained above the experimental safety ratio after optional evidence trimming; raw rows were preserved.

required_core_outputs.description: Explain the supported cohort-level admin actions already generated or exposed by the action_synthesis rule contract; do not require invented actions outside the returned or triggered action set.

evaluation_constraints.description: Every explained or recommended action must be grounded in returned cohort feature-engineered signals or the supplied action-rule contract.
Do not invent urgency, priority, or additional actions without supporting returned data or supported action evidence.

If no supported cohort-level action is returned or triggered, saying no supported action is available is acceptable; penalize that only when deterministic action evidence shows at least one supported action exists.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
